name: Distill Model
description: Plan and verify model distillation with teacher and student model context, dataset evidence, metrics, comparisons, and packaging outputs.

inputs.description: Teacher model identifier, checkpoint, or endpoint description.
Student model architecture, base checkpoint, or target repository.
Distillation dataset identifier, local path, or data source.
Task type and evaluation setting for the distilled model.
Compression, latency, quality, cost, or deployment goal.

permissions.description: Read model cards, dataset cards, license metadata, training configs, and prior evaluation summaries.

approval_points.description: Confirm teacher, student, dataset, metrics, target constraints, and non-goals.
Confirm resource assumptions, run count, checkpoints, and evidence capture before any run starts.
Publish distilled model artifacts, evaluation results, or model card outside the local workspace.

phases.name: Objective And Models
phases.objective: Document teacher, student, task, license constraints, quality target, and deployment constraints.

phases.name: Dataset And Config
phases.objective: Capture dataset lineage, splits, label or prompt format, loss strategy, temperature, seeds, and evaluation metric.

phases.name: Dry Run
phases.objective: Validate a tiny example through teacher target preparation, student forward pass, loss, and metric extraction.

phases.name: Distillation Run
phases.objective: Record distillation run plan, logs, checkpoints, resource assumptions, and training or validation metrics.

phases.name: Evaluation
phases.objective: Compare distilled model against teacher, student baseline, and target constraints with reliability caveats.

phases.name: Packaging
phases.objective: Prepare model card, config notes, evaluation evidence, and optional publication decision.

required_outputs.description: Teacher, student, task, target constraints, metrics, and non-goals.
Dataset source, revision, split mapping, and fingerprint.
Teacher target strategy, loss settings, temperature, seeds, trainer settings, and metric config.
Tiny-run command, output, loss and metric extraction, and exit status.
Training, validation, latency, size, or quality metrics with run identifiers.
Distillation command, environment, resource assumptions, and exit status.
Held-out evaluation, teacher and baseline comparisons, and caveats.
Teacher, baseline student, and distilled model metrics with deltas.
Hub-compatible model card draft for the distilled model.

artifacts.description: Distilled student checkpoint or adapter artifact.
README.md model card with distillation and evaluation metadata.

verifiers.description: Teacher, student, license, task, and target constraints are justified.
Dataset source, revision, split mapping, and fingerprint are recorded.
Distillation loss, target preparation, seeds, trainer settings, and metric configuration are captured.
Dry run validates teacher targets, student forward pass, loss, and metric wiring.
Distillation metrics include split or dataset, value, run id, and comparison field.
Distilled model is compared against teacher and baseline student metrics.
Metric variance, representative errors, resource tradeoffs, and selection caveats were reviewed.
Model card includes distillation context, intended use, datasets, metrics, limitations, and caveats.
Final packaging claims cite config, metrics, comparison table, logs, and artifacts.
